name: Exchange Online delegation
description: Permission groups for Exchange Online. These are workload groups: Exchange Online has its own RBAC (management role groups), so the workload role group binds directly to the Entra group - no Entra directory role involved. Ships the standard built-in Exchange Online role groups - Recipient Management, View-Only Organization Management, Help Desk, Compliance Management, Hygiene Management, and Records Management.

PIM-Definitions-Services.GroupDescription: Exchange Online - Recipient Management (create/manage mailboxes, groups, contacts)
Exchange Online - View-Only Organization Management (read-only org config)
Exchange Online - Help Desk (view recipients, reset basic mailbox settings)
Exchange Online - Compliance Management (retention, journaling, audit, DLP)
Exchange Online - Hygiene Management (anti-spam, anti-malware, mail flow)
Exchange Online - Records Management (retention policies and tags, message classifications)
